title: Friends Fun Optimized
description: A Modpack that offers a seamless Minecraft experience, blending performance, enhancing mods with immersive adventures and quality of life improvements, Perfect for creating unforgettable memories with friends
body:
![Friends Fun icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a9207d58ffc86ce8f35cc1428a997abdc842649.png)

##  [Friends Fun Optimized](https://friendsfunsmp.wixsite.com/friendsfun)
**Best Fit for [Friends Fun SMP](https://friendsfunsmp.wixsite.com/friendsfun).** The *Friends Fun Optimized Modpack* is designed to elevate your Minecraft experience by combining performance-boosting mods with immersive adventures and essential quality-of-life improvements. This modpack ensures smooth multiplayer gameplay and an engaging environment, allowing you to explore vast landscapes, conquer challenges, and build alongside friends without sacrificing performance. Crafted to offer a balanced and enjoyable experience, it makes every session with your friends both memorable and fun.

## How To Run the Modpack?

### 1. Install the Modpack:
- Download the modpack by clicking the Versions button or simply pressing Download.
  
### 2. Set Up the Modpack:
- If your launcher supports in launcher downloads(for ex: Modrinth App, Sk Launcher), select the modpack directly within the launcher.
- If not, import the downloaded modpack into your Minecraft Launcher.
  
### 3. Enjoy it!!
- Once everything is set up, launch the modpack and dive into your enhanced Minecraft experience with our SMP.
  
## Minimal Mods, Unlimited Fun

Friends Fun Optimized keeps things simple with a streamlined selection of just 24 mods. This lean setup is perfect for older computers and lower-spec hardware, ensuring smooth gameplay without sacrificing the fun. See the [Changelogs](https://modrinth.com/modpack/friends-fun-optimized/changelog) page for more details. Most importantly, the Pre-set settings in the modpack ensure optimal performance and visual quality right out of the box. Just try it out, we assure you that you will be satisfied!

## Support
To report an issue, receive support, or give your feedback, please visit our website [Friends Fun site](https://friendsfunsmp.wixsite.com/friendsfun).
